---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Use Case

What creator workflow would this improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how the feature should work.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you tried.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This request does not require committing private media files.
- [ ] This request can be demonstrated with dummy examples or dry-run output.
- [ ] I removed personal paths and private filenames from examples.
